The Notonia genus, which includes N. fulgens, is a type of flowering plant that is native to tropical regions. Research suggests that the Notonia genus may possess health benefits due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which could potentially aid in reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. The bioactive constituents of the Notonia genus include flavonoids, alkaloids, and other secondary metabolites, which have been shown to exhibit various biological activities. Notonia species are often used in traditional medicine, and herbal preparations made from these plants include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues.
